name: solidstep-monorepo
description: Next Solid Step towards a more performant web

scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter solidstep exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @varlabs/create-solidstep exec tsc --noEmit
scripts.release: pnpm --filter "./packages/*" build && pnpm --filter "./packages/*" publish --access public --no-git-checks && changeset tag
